consumable_blueberry_pie.name: Blueberry Pie
consumable_blueberry_pie.description: Slot into a loop to eat one banked Blueberry Pie each pass, restoring health. The slot stays even when the pantry runs dry (Phase 5 provisional content — first consumable cards for the §3E loop logic).
